title: Senior Software Engineer - HCL Technologies Ventures Solutions - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - HCL Technologies Ventures Solutions - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
We at HCL Technologies Ventures Solutions are looking for an experienced Senior Software Engineer based out of Ghaziabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About HCL Technologies Ventures Solutions:
HCL Technologies Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HCL Technologies Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
